entries.label: Version 1
entries.prompt:
Build a solution detail page template for Wallet Nation using the established design system (white background, Poppins typography, bright lime #C9FA49 / deep olive #4B5A34 / pale tint #EAF7C9 green palette, #171717 primary text, #6B7280 secondary text, #E5E7EB borders).

Structure:
- Sticky nav (Home, Solutions, FAQ, "Get protected" bright-lime pill button), with a "← Back to solutions" link beneath it.
- Uppercase eyebrow label (solution name, deep olive or bright lime).
- Large Poppins headline (weight 600) + one-sentence sub-copy (Poppins weight 400, #6B7280).
- A "THE RISK" section: a bold stat or short phrase as the visual focal point, styled on a pale-lime-tint (#EAF7C9) card, paired with a small uppercase category label and a short risk paragraph beneath.
- A "Key benefits" section: three cards (white background, #E5E7EB border, soft shadow), each with a title (bold, near-black) and description (muted gray).
- Closing CTA band: "Ready to protect your [solution]?" headline with a "Talk to us" bright-lime pill button.
- Shared footer matching the homepage (tagline, link columns, social icons, copyright).

Generate this page first using the following content for Crypto Commerce:
Headline: "Protect stablecoin payments before settlement becomes final."
Sub: "Wallet Nation enables payment platforms and merchants to introduce non-custodial payment protection for stablecoin transactions without changing existing payment infrastructure."
Risk stat: "< 60 seconds" — label "SETTLEMENT FINALITY" — "Once a stablecoin payment is confirmed on-chain, settlement is generally irreversible. Wallet Nation introduces protection before finality without taking custody."
Benefits: Conditional payment ("Customers can commit funds knowing payment is conditional on delivery — eliminating the leap of faith that crypto commerce currently requires."); Merchant protection ("Merchants know payment is secured before fulfilling an order, reducing exposure to non-delivery disputes and fraud."); Zero integration ("Wallet Nation works alongside existing crypto payment infrastructure — no new rails, no new wallets, no customer re-education.")
CTA: "Ready to protect your crypto commerce?"

entries.label: Version 2
entries.prompt:
Recreate the "Crypto Commerce" solutions template page using this exact layout structure:
1. Hero card (rounded, soft accent-tinted background): back link "← Back to solutions", small uppercase eyebrow label "CRYPTO COMMERCE", large bold H1 headline, one-paragraph subtext below.
2. "The Risk" section (two columns on a light grey background): left column has small uppercase label "THE RISK", a large bold stat/headline, and a short paragraph; right column has a rounded accent-tinted callout card with a short bold centered uppercase phrase.
3. "Key benefits" section (white background): H2 "Key benefits", followed by a grid of rounded light-grey cards (2 per row, wrapping to a 3rd row if needed), each with a bold title and short description.
4. Closing CTA section (light grey background): centered H2 question, with a solid accent-colored rounded button below it.
5. Footer: simple centered copyright line.

Content to use:
- Eyebrow label: CRYPTO COMMERCE
- H1: Protect stablecoin payments before settlement becomes final.
- Subtext: Wallet Nation enables payment platforms and merchants to introduce non-custodial payment protection for stablecoin transactions without changing existing payment infrastructure.
- Risk label: THE RISK
- Risk stat: < 60 seconds
- Risk paragraph: Once a stablecoin payment is confirmed on-chain, settlement is generally irreversible. Wallet Nation introduces protection before finality without taking custody.
- Callout box text: SETTLEMENT FINALITY
- Key benefit 1 — Conditional payment: Customers can commit funds knowing payment is conditional on delivery — eliminating the leap of faith that crypto commerce currently requires.
- Key benefit 2 — Merchant protection: Merchants know payment is secured before fulfilling an order, reducing exposure to non-delivery disputes and fraud.
- Key benefit 3 — Zero integration: Wallet Nation works alongside existing crypto payment infrastructure — no new rails, no new wallets, no customer re-education.
- CTA headline: Ready to protect your crypto commerce?
- Button text: Talk to us

entries.prompt: The Headings for each section in the hero page & the Solutions pages need to be a bigger & a more striking green
